title: Usopp’s Trickery Turns Serious
description: On pages 14–17, usopp’s trickery turns serious focuses on Usopp, Chew, Nami, Arlong as usopp is forced into a one-on-one fight against Chew and struggles between fear, lies, and real courage.
scene: On pages 14–17, usopp’s trickery turns serious focuses on Usopp, Chew, Nami, Arlong as usopp is forced into a one-on-one fight against Chew and struggles between fear, lies, and real courage.

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
